scope: Add a realistic daily MVP pass goal to the 100-pass master plan and wire the weekly deep audit to review, audit, and adjust those goals only for this project.

dailyGoal.acceptedPassDefinition: A pushed commit or published external artifact with committed repo records plus validation or a specific blocker that reduces P0/P1 MVP ambiguity.

weeklyCalibration.changed: Prompt now reviews the last seven days of committed evidence, counts accepted MVP passes against 2/day and 14/week, and updates only this project's master plan and automation memory with next-week goal/allocation when evidence requires it.

validation: Automation contract checker passed for 6 automations.

selfImprovement.evidence: Bryan explicitly requested a realistic daily goal plus weekly review, audit, and adjustment of those goals only for this project.

nextActions: Weekly deep audit should count accepted MVP passes every Sunday.
If the project misses, exceeds, or misallocates the goal, weekly audit should update only this project's master plan and automation memory with the next-week goal/allocation.
Core rebuild should spend the next accepted MVP passes on the Cloudflare app scaffold, database schema, auth, permissions, private evidence storage, audit events, tests, and deployment path.
